# Beyond _crumbs,_ we craft  the _timeless._

A Parisian pâtisserie tucked on Thomas Street, Limerick. Hand-laminated croissants, slow-built entremets, and small-batch cakes — made every morning, sold out by lunch.

Begin JourneyPlan Your Visit

4.8 · 118 Google reviews

12 Thomas St · LimerickEst. Pâtisserie & BakeryV94 KXF1 · IE

Maison

![Angel Dust interior](https://images.pexels.com/photos/18330310/pexels-photo-18330310.jpeg)

Plate № 02The Counter, 7:00 AM

\[ N°01 \] Our Story

## Quiet patience,  _extraordinary_  pastry.

Tucked away on Thomas Street, Angel Dust began with one quiet obsession: bring the elegance and rigour of a Parisian pâtisserie to the cobbled streets of Limerick.

Every croissant laminated by hand. Every entremet built layer by layer the day before service. We don't take shortcuts — and yes, that's why we sometimes sell out by 2pm.

100%

Hand-made daily

4.8★

118 Google reviews

Thu–Sun

Opening hours

\[ N°02 \] The Pâtisserie

## Each piece, _a small work of art._

Five plates, written for the season. The counter shifts each week — what's here is what's true today.

### Macarons

### Viennoiserie

Three-day cold-fermented dough, French butter, laminated by hand. The croissant you remember from holiday — every single morning.

## Skip the queue.  _Reserve_ your favourites.

Cakes and pastries sell out quickly. Fill this in by Tuesday and we'll have your order ready for collection from Thursday onward. We'll confirm by email or phone within 24 hours.

- 48 hours notice for custom cakes
